title: Ombudsmen Act 1975 — New Zealand
description: New Zealand legislation establishing the office of Ombudsman and defining their powers to investigate complaints against public service agencies, state enterprises, and other organizations. Covers complaint procedures, investigation authority, confidentiality obligations, and coordination with other oversight bodies.
